intended_use: TeraRecon Cardiovascular.Calcification.CT is intended to provide an automatic 3D segmentation of calcified plaques within the coronary arteries and outputs a mask for calcium scoring systems to use fo
intended_use_full: TeraRecon Cardiovascular.Calcification.CT is intended to provide an automatic 3D segmentation of calcified plaques within the coronary arteries and outputs a mask for calcium scoring systems to use for calculations. The results of TeraRecon Cardiovascular.Calcification.CT are intended to be used in conjunction with other patient information by trained professionals who are responsible for making any patient management decision per the standard of care.
ground_truth: Majority vote among segmentation results from 3 independent annotators who manually segmented coronary vessels and applied thresholds to create calcification masks
other_metrics: Dice similarity coefficient ≥80% with 95% CI lower bound ≥75% for vessel calcification segmentation; performance consistent across sex, age groups, vendors, and acquisition sites
